MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The court will not issue an order to appear to counsel for not appearing and will continue the matter as a courtesy, this time.

The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to June 9, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Examiner is to email counsel to advise of the continued hearing date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Continued To Jan-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Sarah McShane and the Attorney Harry Maring to appear on January 19, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
